lines.text: The Ashenfall grows thicker each day. I fear what lies ahead for our village.
In my youth, the meadow stretched green and vibrant to the horizon. Now look at it... grey and withered.
Don't touch anything. Half of these ingredients would turn you into a toad. The other half would do worse.
The corruption whispers to me at night. It promises power... but I know better than to listen.
Stay sharp out there. The roads aren't safe anymore.
Would you like to browse my wares? I have potions, salves, and remedies for all manner of ailments.
The sheep are doing better now, thanks to you. Though they still get spooked when the ash falls heavy.
Need something forged? I work with whatever metals you bring me, though the dark iron from the mountains is the finest.
The trees in the Cursed Forest bleed purple sap now. Used to be normal amber. Everything's changing.
Rare goods from distant lands! I've traveled through the corruption to bring you the finest wares. Prices are fair, I promise!
